name: PostProducer
description: 后期合成：音频混音 + 字幕烧录 → final.mp4

input_extras.description: 时间线（含字幕和音频配置）

exec.command: cd post-producer/scripts && python3 verify_output.py <output_dir> <total_duration> && python3 audio_mixer.py <output_dir>/video.mp4 <output_dir>/voiceover.mp3 <output_dir>/bgm.mp3 <timeline> --output <output_dir>/final.mp4 --srt <output_dir>/timeline.srt
